title: Calcite Design System from Esri – UI framework
content: # Esri Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Brainly Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen INPS Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Michelin Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Rei Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Thumbtack Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Calcite from Directories: Components: Calcite Design System offers a comprehensive suite of design and development resources for creating cohesive, user-friendly experiences across Esri applications. Esri Design System features a UI kit, icons, color schemes, and a wide web component library. Components provides a rich collection of flexible, framework-agnostic web components, enabling efficient and consistent web application development with minimal effort.
